commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Crabbox wrapper, Crabbox skill guidance, and wrapper tests so unqualified Windows/WSL2 run and warmup commands select Azure when the Crabbox binary advertises it while preserving explicit provider, env, older-binary, and lease-reuse paths.

PR surface: Tests +104, Docs 0, Other +40. Total +144 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR changes a provider-selection policy. The current-main and proposed behaviors are source-inspectable in scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide whether the Azure-preferred Windows/WSL2 default is intended before this draft PR proceeds.

target.title: fix(crabbox): prefer Azure for Windows targets
target.body:
Summary
- Prefer Azure for unqualified Crabbox Windows/WSL2 run and warmup commands when the selected Crabbox binary advertises Azure.
- Preserve explicit --provider, CRABBOX_PROVIDER, existing --id lease reuse, and older Crabbox binaries that do not advertise Azure.
- Update the repo-local Crabbox skill guidance to prefer Azure for Windows/WSL2 when quota or credits are available.

Verification
- CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts --testNamePattern "prefers Azure|keeps explicit provider env|keeps the configured provider|keeps existing Windows lease"
- node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm check:changed
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main

Notes
- AI-assisted.
target.author: vincentkoc
